meta.title: World War I
meta.historical_context: A family feud that killed millions.

kaiser-wilhelm-ii.name: Kaiser Wilhelm II
kaiser-wilhelm-ii.description: The last German Emperor. Wanted a "Place in the Sun". Got a world war instead.

archduke-franz-ferdinand.name: Franz Ferdinand
archduke-franz-ferdinand.description: Austrian heir. His death triggered the apocalypse.

woodrow-wilson.name: Woodrow Wilson
woodrow-wilson.description: American President. Wanted to make the world "safe for democracy".

long-peace.title: The Long Peace 🕊️🌍
long-peace.description: The assassination fails. The 20th century is peaceful.
long-peace.divergence_description: The driver takes the correct turn in Sarajevo.
long-peace.present_day_status: Europe is a collection of constitutional monarchies. Biplanes are still popular for sport. The world is nostalgic for an era that never ended. 🎩🚂

federal-austria.title: United States of Greater Austria
federal-austria.description: Franz Ferdinand reforms the empire into a federation of equals.

german-victory.title: Pax Germanica 🇩🇪👑
german-victory.divergence_description: The Schlieffen Plan encircles Paris successfully.
german-victory.present_day_status: The German Empire is the world's superpower. Berlin is the capital of the world. 🌍🏰

fall-of-paris.title: Fall of Paris
fall-of-paris.description: The German army marches under the Arc de Triomphe.

negotiated-peace.title: Peace Without Victory 🤝🏳️
negotiated-peace.description: The war ends in 1917 without a clear winner.
negotiated-peace.divergence_description: The US stays out. Exhaustion leads to truce.
negotiated-peace.present_day_status: The world is multipolar. The League of Nations is actually effective. 🌐

peace-treaty.title: Treaty of Stockholm
peace-treaty.description: Status quo ante bellum. Everyone goes home.

bitter-peace.long_term: Cold War between Monarchies and Democracies

sarajevo.title: The Wrong Turn (1914)
sarajevo.text: Sarajevo. The Archduke's driver has taken a wrong turn. He stops to reverse. Gavrilo Princip is standing at the corner with a pistol.

reverse.consequence: Princip fires. The Archduke dies. War begins.

speed-away.consequence: Princip misses his chance. The Archduke survives.

schlieffen.title: The Schlieffen Plan (1914)
schlieffen.text: Belgium. The German army is marching on Paris. The plan requires speed. But the Belgians are resisting.

turn.text: Turn inwards. Attack the French army.
turn.consequence: The Miracle of the Marne. The trench lines form.

encircle.text: Ignore the flank. March on Paris!
encircle.consequence: A gamble. But it pays off. Paris falls.

zimmermann.title: The Telegram (1917)
zimmermann.text: We are starving. The U-boats are our only hope. Should we ask Mexico to attack the USA?

send.text: Send the telegram. Unrestricted submarine warfare.
send.consequence: The US decrypts it and declares war. We are doomed.

cancel.text: Cancel the plan. It is too risky.
cancel.consequence: The US stays neutral. The war ends in a stalemate.

armistice.title: The Railway Carriage (1918)
armistice.text: Foch dictates terms. Germany must surrender heavy weapons, navy, and accept guilt.

accept.text: Accept all terms. End the suffering.
accept.consequence: Germany is humiliated. Seeds of WWII are sown.

refuse.consequence: The Allies invade Germany. Total destruction.
